text:
RE-RENDER 文天 voice for Code-100 #26 (script CHANGED). Same MiniMax recipe (male-qn-wenrun, speech-02-hd) + loudnorm.
NEW TEXT (render EXACTLY, English terms kept as-is):
Cloud Code 挑战,一百个项目,第二十六个。vibe coding,Spline 3D。
Output: commit to tasks/T-026/out/wentian_26b.mp3 + wentian_26b_norm.mp3. Then: git add -A && git -c user.name=Karen -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Karen] T-026 #26 voiceover v2 (Cloud Code/vibe coding)' && (git push||(git pull --rebase origin main&&git push)); then bin/warroom-say '[Karen] done: #26 voiceover v2 pushed (wentian_26b_norm.mp3)'.
